description: As an I-O psychologist for an organizational consulting firm, convert the 'Leadership Competency Assessment 360' survey at http://localhost/index.php/admin (admin/Admin123!) from open-access to closed-access using unique tokens. Add Marcus Thompson (m.thompson@acmecorp.com), Sarah Chen (s.chen@acmecorp.com), David Okafor (d.okafor@acmecorp.com), and Priya Sharma (p.sharma@acmecorp.com) to the participant list. Set the invitation email subject to 'Your 360-Degree Leadership Feedback Request - Action Required' and generate unique access tokens for all participants.

metadata.instrument_source: Adapted from Korn Ferry Lominger Leadership Architect competency framework
